chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1236 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 04-09-2025 None present for the petitioner. Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Syed Naveed Ali Shah, D.A.G. **** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation has been received. However, learned counsel for respondents files statement along with certain documents and submits that the grievance of the petitioner has now been redressed and he will receive correct bill in the next month. Since grievance of the petitioner has been redressed; therefore, this petition having become infructuous is hereby disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
